en.name: Molot Arms Simonov OP-SKS 7.62x39 automatic carbine
en.description: A modified version of the Molot Arms OP-SKS hunting carbine chambered in 7.62x39mm. The original semi-automatic fire-control mechanism has been reworked to provide three-round burst and fully automatic fire. Additional modifications to the action and gas system improve cycling during rapid fire, though the rifle's traditional layout and powerful cartridge make sustained automatic fire difficult to control.
